name: python3-requests-ntlm
title: python3-requests-ntlm
summary: Adds support for NTLM authentication to the requests library
description:
Adds support for NTLM authentication to the requests library
This package allows for HTTP NTLM authentication using
python-requests, the HTTP library for humans.  HttpNtlmAuth extends
requests' AuthBase, so it can be dropped directly in place, or used
in conjunction with a Session to make use of connection pooling.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-requests-ntlm because Adds support for NTLM authentication to the requests library.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-requests-ntlm as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-requests-ntlm with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-requests-ntlm --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
